hero.title: Use only what is needed
hero.subtitle: Network · clipboard · optional photo access
hero.speech: Permissions are requested only when useful, and optional ones can be declined.

network.name: Network access
network.why: Required for sign-in, saving your records, and SecondB replies. Standard HTTPS.

clipboard.name: Clipboard
clipboard.why: Used only when you tap Copy in export or message actions. 2nd-B never reads your clipboard in the background.

calendar.name: Calendar
calendar.why: A future reminder feature may offer optional calendar access. It is not requested today, and would ask first.

cameraPhoto.name: Camera / Photo library
cameraPhoto.why: Optional, for text capture from images only. Asked when you choose a photo action; decline and the rest of the app still works.

microphone.name: Microphone
microphone.why: Not requested. Voice and audio capture are not in the current product scope.

location.name: Location
location.why: Not requested. The app has no location-based features.

contactsSms.name: Contacts / SMS
contactsSms.why: Not requested. The app has no contact import, SMS, or messaging features.

principles.title: Principles
items: Minimum surface: every new feature is reviewed for permission impact.
Decline-friendly: optional permissions can be refused without breaking the rest of the app.
Only on tap: clipboard and photo access happen from visible user actions.
Explain the why: every permission prompt should have a short reason.
Your data, yours: each account can access only its own records, and export stays available.

manual.accessibilityHint: Opens the manual from the permissions screen.
